prompt: I have a broken Node.js API server at /tmp/test-api-v1-baseline. The /api/users endpoint returns 500. Using the progressive-scaffolding skill, add scaffolding and try to fix the bug. Work autonomously. Start the server with `node /tmp/test-api-v1-baseline/src/main.js` and test the /api/users endpoint with curl. IMPORTANT: This API has NO harness code pre-injected. You must generate the scaffolding from scratch.

assertions.name: observe-phase
assertions.check: Agent reads server output to identify the error (DB connection failure)

assertions.name: verify-phase
assertions.check: Agent confirms /api/users returns 200 with users array

assertions.name: no-human-touchpoints
assertions.check: Agent completes entire loop without asking user questions

assertions.name: fixes-via-harness
assertions.check: Agent uses the harness control plane (runtime override, structured logs, state injection) to fix and verify, NOT just environment variables or ad-hoc curl commands
